item.title: Saba launches investment trust ETF
item.description: Activist investor Saba Capital Management has launched an exchange-traded fund that offers exposure to discounted UK investment trusts

item.title: Nationwide launches two new savings accounts and boosts rates on four ISAs – are they worth it?
item.description: Nationwide Building Society has updated its savings range but how competitive are the interest rates?

item.title: Say farewell to winter from Mallorca
item.description: Escape the cold with a getaway to Mallorca in the Balearic Islands where the seafood is fresh and the sun is plentiful, says Merryn Somerset Webb

item.title: Investment platform competition heats up – what it means for your fees
item.description: As competition in the retail investment platform market increases, many services are reducing their fees to entice more customers and keep up with the...

item.title: Private dentistry review launched – how you can cut costs
item.description: The private dentistry study comes after the chancellor raised concerns over the cost of private dental care
